overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in robes exploring a gothic castle interior. The character walks through a grand hall with vaulted ceilings, transitions through a doorway, and ascends a magical rotating spiral staircase lined with portraits.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle entrance hall with vaulted ceilings

events.description: character transitions from walking on the hall floor to ascending the central stone staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall toward the central staircase, passing other robed figures standing near the archways

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the right stone archway
robed figure standing in the shadows of the left archway

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting
large gothic arches lining the sides of the hall
wide stone staircase leading upward in the center of the hall
large hanging chandelier with multiple candles
wall-mounted candle sconces providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious gothic hall with high vaulted ceilings and massive stone archways. Warm light from wall sconces and a central chandelier illuminates the stone tile floor as the character approaches and begins ascending the wide central staircase, passing other robed figures standing near the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor leading to spiral staircase tower

events.description: character passes through large wooden doors from the main hall into a narrower corridor
character begins ascending the grand spiral staircase at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: passing through a doorway into a narrow stone corridor and approaching the grand spiral staircase

entered.detail: large dark wooden doors with iron hardware that open to the corridor
narrow enclosed hallway with stone walls
wall-mounted lanterns illuminating the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character moves through large wooden doors into a narrow, enclosed stone corridor illuminated by wall-mounted lanterns. The space transitions from the open grandeur of the hall to a tight passageway leading to the spiral staircase tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: magical rotating spiral staircase with portrait gallery

events.description: the magical stone staircase begins to shift and rotate beneath the character's feet
character adjusts path as the staircase shifts direction during the ascent

agents.ego_description: steadily climbing the rotating spiral staircase, passing numerous framed portraits on the stone walls

entered.detail: magical rotating stone staircase with wide steps that shift position
ornate carved stone railing along the right side of the staircase
numerous framed portraits lining the curved stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand spiral staircase, a magical structure that slowly rotates and shifts its configuration. The curved stone walls are densely lined with framed portraits, and warm light from wall sconces illuminates the continuous climb.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper spiral staircase with gothic windows and student traffic

events.description: other robed students appear on the staircase landing ahead, indicating a populated area
character passes other students who are also ascending the staircase

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the spiral staircase, passing other students who are ascending or standing on the landings

notable_agents.action: robed student ascending the stairs ahead of the character
robed student standing on the landing to the left side

entered.detail: tall arched windows with diamond-patterned glass set in the stone wall
stone landing platform visible at the top of the current flight

segments.scene_description: Continuing the ascent into the upper levels, the character encounters other students on the staircase. Tall gothic windows become visible on the left wall, allowing a view of the night outside, as the magical staircase continues its slow rotation toward the upper landing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the expansive grandeur of a gothic hall into the intimate, shifting geometry of a magical staircase tower. It begins by following a robed character through a spacious hall of vaulted ceilings and stone archways, moving past silent figures toward a wide central staircase. As the character passes through heavy wooden doors, the open space constricts into a narrow stone corridor lit by lanterns, leading directly into the mouth of a spiral tower. The scene then shifts to a steady ascent up a rotating magical staircase, where the walls are densely lined with framed portraits under the glow of warm sconces. Finally, the climb continues toward the upper landing, passing other students as tall gothic windows open on the left to reveal the dark night sky outside.
